summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KPI Notification System. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All 7 frontend tests passed (100%). The notification bell, notification panel, KPI alert rules configuration, and rule creation dialog all work correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height). Non-blocking but could be cleaned up.
Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent}. Accessibility improvement needed.

backend_notifications.GET /api/notifications: PASSED - Returns notifications list with correct structure
backend_notifications.PUT /api/notifications/read-all: PASSED - Marks all notifications as read

backend_kpi_alert_rules.GET /api/kpi-alert-rules: PASSED - Returns rules list with correct structure
backend_kpi_alert_rules.POST /api/kpi-alert-rules: PASSED - Creates new rule with all fields

backend_kpi_evaluation.POST /api/kpi-alert-rules/evaluate/{peri: PASSED - Evaluates rules and creates notifications

frontend_notification_bell.description: Bell icon visible in sidebar header with data-testid='notification-bell'
frontend_notification_bell.badge: Shows unread count (1 unread notification found)

frontend_notification_panel.description: Panel opens on bell click with data-testid='notification-panel'
frontend_notification_panel.content: Shows 2 notifications with KPI alerts, mark all read button present

frontend_alertas_kpi_tab.description: Tab visible on /financial-metrics page with data-testid='tab-alerts'

frontend_kpi_alert_config.description: KPI Alert Config component loads with data-testid='kpi-alert-config'
frontend_kpi_alert_config.existing_rules: 1 existing rule (Margen Bruto < 50%) with toggle, edit, delete buttons

frontend_nueva_regla_dialog.form_elements: All form elements present: select-metric, select-condition, input-threshold, select-level, save-alert-rule-btn

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data. 1 KPI alert rule (Margen Bruto < 50%) and 2 notifications already present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: KPI Notification System fully implemented and tested. Key data-testids: notification-bell (sidebar), notification-badge (unread count), notification-panel (popover), notification-item-{id}, mark-all-read, tab-alerts (Financial Metrics page), kpi-alert-config, create-alert-rule-btn, alert-rule-dialog, select-metric, select-condition, input-threshold, select-level, save-alert-rule-btn, toggle-rule-{id}, edit-rule-{id}, delete-rule-{id}. Backend endpoints: /api/notifications, /api/notifications/unread-count, /api/notifications/{id}/read, /api/notifications/read-all, /api/kpi-alert-rules, /api/kpi-alert-rules/{id}/toggle, /api/kpi-alert-rules/evaluate/{periodo}. KPI evaluation is triggered automatically when financial statements are uploaded.
